Abstract
Description of the project.

This is a Quarto document template styled with the official UZH look and feel. The theme is defined in the uzh.scss file. For documentation and help, please visit the Quarto website.

Objectives

Data import

Code 
set.seed(2025)
data = data.frame(x = rnorm(100), y = rnorm(100))
Code 
col = data.frame(blue    = "#0028A5",
                 cyan    = "#4AC9E3",
                 apple   = "#A4D233",
                 gold    = "#FFC845",
                 orange  = "#FC4C02",
                 berry   = "#BF0D3E",
                 black   = "#000000",
                 white   = "#FFFFFF",
                 blue.4  = "#001E7C"
)

Data processing

Quality control

Descriptive statistics

Code 
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
plot(x = data$x, y = data$y, col = col$berry, pch = 19, xlab = "x", ylab = "y")
hist(x = data$y, col = col$apple, main = NULL, xlab = "y")
